theme_archetype.reasoning: As an enterprise DSP platform for traders and analytics leads, the interface must prioritize authority, clarity, and function. The dense data requirements (PMP, supply scores, Rx lift) necessitate a stark, high-contrast, Swiss-inspired 'Control Room' environment rather than a warm, soft consumer app.

headings.usage: Used for all dashboard titles, module names, and metric primary numbers.

body.usage: Used for all functional UI elements, table data, labels, and analytical text.

mono.usage: Crucial for the RTB bidding simulator, data cost arrays, match rates, NPI lists, and any tabular financial data.

rules: Never use pure black or pure gray. Use slate (blue-tinted gray) for neutrality.
CTA buttons must use the primary brand blue, never gradients.
Use colors strictly for data status and hierarchy, not decoration.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight and dense. Use gap-4 or gap-6 for dashboard widgets. Internal padding p-4 or p-6.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align all data labels, tabular content, and metric names. Only center specific icon-based states (empty states).
layout_and_spacing.structure: Sidebar navigation (w-64, hidden on mobile) + Top utility header (h-14) + Main content area.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-slate-200), max rounded-md (6px radius). NO heavy drop shadows. Hover states should feature a subtle -translate-y-[1px] and shadow-sm.
surfaces_and_borders.header: Solid white background with border-b border-slate-200. Not glassmorphism since this is a dense clinical/B2B app.

components.tables: Shadcn Table. Highly dense. py-2 instead of py-4. Use IBM Plex Mono for numeric columns.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Must use the defined data_visualization colors. Use line charts for RTB bid simulator over time, bar charts for Lift vs Control, and compose charts for the Outcome-Adjusted Supply Score.
components.forms: Shadcn Form elements. Square or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Input fields bg-white, border-slate-300.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Prefer transparent background with bottom-border active states for a cleaner SaaS look rather than pill backgrounds.
components.badges: Use highly legible badges for 'Supply Quality' or 'Vendor Status' (e.g., bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800).
components.ai_insights: For 'Claude Sonnet 4.5 powered narrative insights', use a dedicated card with a subtle indigo border or light indigo background (bg-indigo-50) and a distinct spark icon to separate AI narrative from raw data.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Explicit hover states on all rows and buttons. transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.loader: Skeleton loaders for data widgets. No bouncy animations.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Subtle opacity and transform for tab switching or modal opening.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use 18px or 20px icons with stroke-width 1.5 or 2. Consistent stroke weight is critical.

avatar_male.description: Professional male avatar for user profile or account settings.

avatar_female.description: Professional female avatar for user profile or account settings.

campaign_banner_placeholder.description: Close-up of pills for the Campaign Builder preview module if a visual is needed.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, metric cards, and form inputs MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='rtb-simulator-start', data-testid='supply-score-metric'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure IBM Plex Sans text at text-sm meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio on bg-white or bg-slate-50. Mute tertiary text must not fall below 4.5:1.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Setup the exact typography using Google Fonts (Manrope, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono). Override Tailwind's default sans and mono.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Build a comprehensive layout wrapper: Sidebar Nav with multi-tab navigation to the specific modules (Campaign Overview, Audience Scorer, PMP Scorecard, RTB Simulator, etc.).
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Implement the 'Killer Feature': PMP / Supply Scorecard using Recharts to visualize the composite Outcome-Adjusted Supply Score.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: For the RTB simulator, use a real-time updating chart or a visually dense parameter tuning interface.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do NOT use placeholder image URLs like 'via.placeholder.com'. Only use the image URLs provided in this JSON.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Integrate Shadcn primitives (Card, Table, Tabs, Input, Select, Button, Badge) and customize them to remove heavy shadows and large border radii. Make them look dense and clinical.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not center layout contents; keep the dashboard grid left-aligned and structured.
